capabilities_used.evidence: 高频用于 BTC.D 作为山寨季触发器。2024-12-24: "$BTC (Dominance) Rising Wedge Breakout + Retest confirmed! ✅ #Altseason has officially begun"；配图 1/2 也都是 BTC.D 周线/日线上的上升楔形下破并指向 48% 附近。
这是他最核心的跨市场框架之一。2024-11-29: "#Altseason 2024-25 has Officially kicked off!"；2024-11-26: "$BTC.D ... Lower trendline is weakening, Expecting a Wedge breakdown"；多张图都直接用 BTC Dominance 下行来推导 Altseason。

几乎是他最常见的单币看多形态。2025-01-30: "$ETH Falling Wedge formation on the Daily timeframe Chart..!! A successful breakout could push it to $4444"；2025-02-20/24: 多次说 BTC 日线 Falling Wedge Breakout 将指向 105k/106k；2024-11-27: "$DOT Ready to FLY.. Falling Wedge Breakout on the Weekly timeframe Chart"。

对 BTC 延续上涨经常用旗形。2024-06-25: "$BTC is forming Bullish Flag Pattern on the Weekly TF Chart..!! 88k is Programmed"；2024-04-26: "A Successful Bullish Flag Breakout will Send $BTC #Bitcoin to 86k"；2024-04-22: "$BTC is forming Bullish flag pattern on the daily timeframe chart"。

对 BTC/ETH 的突破确认很常用。2024-12-14: "$BTC Expecting Ascending Triangle upside Breakout next week..!! Next Stop : 112k"；2024-07-30: "Ascending triangle Breakout/Retest on the Monthly timeframe has already been Confirmed"；2025-05-28/30: "$ETH Ascending Triangle formation on the 12h Chart"。

会在顶部/回调阶段用 RSI 背离做短中期警示。2024-12-18: "$BTC Massive Bearish Divergence on the Daily timeframe Chart..!! Expecting 8-10% Correction"；2025-06-12 与 2025-06-18: 多次提示 BTC 周线 RSI bearish divergence，目标 96-92k / 92-94k。

较少直接说背离，但会把 RSI 结构当底部线索。2024-04-20: "$BTC Daily RSI is forming Falling Wedge formation..!! Seems like It has bottomed out"；2024-04-23: "$BTC Daily RSI has broken out of a falling wedge Pattern, indicating Bitcoin is Ready for a 15-20% Bullish Rally"。

会用 MA reclaim 做趋势切换确认，但频率低于图形。2025-06-11: "$ETH #Ethereum Bulls finally Reclaimed the Daily MA200 (2660)..✅"；2025-09-26: "MA200 (104K) retest could spark a Rebound"；2024-04-22: "weekly candle closes above the EMA10, signaling that bulls remain firmly in control"。
他默认把大部分观察建立在上涨主趋势未坏的前提上。2024-12-19: "Bitcoin Bulls Are In Complete Control! Hold it tight"；2024-09-28: "$BTC bulls are Currently in full Control!"；2024-12-15: "$BTC Bulls are in control right now"。
他不只讲上涨，还会把抛物式加速视为阶段尾声。图片 7 直接在 BTC 周线上标注 "Parabolic step-like formation"、Base 1-4、100k 与 "Sell Point"；这明显是抛物线末端衰竭/加速结构框架。
虽然整体偏多，但在局部回调里也会切换为空头结构。2025-08-18: "$BTC Rising Wedge Breakdown is Confirmed on the Daily TF Chart..✅"；2025-09-22: "Rising Wedge has already broken and now a Bearish Flag pattern is forming"。
使用频次明显低于多头形态，但会在回调段拿来警示。2025-09-22 明确写到 "Rising Wedge has already broken and now a Bearish Flag pattern is forming"。
图里会关注关键位的长影线/拒绝。图片 2 在 BTC.D 楔形破位后出现长上影回踩失败，再配下行箭头；虽然推文不常显式命名 pin bar，但图形表达体现出关键位拒绝逻辑。
经常强调假跌破/诱空后上行。2025-05-30: "Time to trap the $BTC #Bitcoin bears and Send it back above 110K!"；2025-03-17: "Bitcoin will hit 78k first to grab liquidity before an Upside Breakout"，对应先扫流动性再起飞。
他不是系统性 SMC 交易员，但会反复讲先扫流动性再走主趋势。2025-03-17: "hit 78k first to grab liquidity before an Upside Breakout"；2025-03-29: "Late shorts will get REKT soon"。

虽然不是严格链上/周期派，但对 2024-25 bullrun/altseason 的节奏判断带明显周期叙事。2024-11-27: "Bullrun 2024-25"；2024-04-30: "Next 5-6 months gonna be truly EPIC for Bitcoin"；2024-06-23: "Q3 & Q4 gonna be EPIC for the Altcoins"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Broadening Wedge Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Price oscillates inside two diverging trendlines and eventually breaks out, with target projected from the widest part of the formation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格在两条发散趋势线之间震荡，最终向上或向下突破；目标通常取形态最宽处做投射。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 这是他高频专用词。2024-10-29: "$BTC is finally Breaking out of Broadening Wedge after 8-months of Consolidation"；2024-11-29: "#ETH Descending Broadening Wedge Upside Breakout is Finally Confirmed"；2025-06-09: "$BTC Descending Broadening Wedge Upside Breakout is Confirmed"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Bullish Pennant Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: After a strong impulse, price compresses into a small converging pennant and breaks higher for trend continuation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 强势拉升后，价格缩进为小型收敛三角旗，向上突破后延续原趋势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-12-23: "$SOL Breaks Out and Retests the Bullish Pennant on the Weekly Chart!"；2024-10-22: "$SOL is Preparing for the Bullish Pennant upside Breakout"；2024-07-27: "$SOL Bullish Pennant Upside Breakout has Confirmed"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Symmetrical Triangle Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Price compresses between converging higher lows and lower highs; breakout direction determines continuation or reversal bias.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格在抬高低点与降低高点之间收敛，对称三角形突破方向决定后续偏向。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-02-27: "$MATIC ... Symmetrical Triangle Upside Breakout/Retest has confirmed"；2024-07-31: "$XRP Massive Symmetrical Triangle Upside Breakout is finally Confirmed"；2024-09-27: "$PEPE Symmetrical Triangle Upside Breakout is Confirmed"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Bump and Run Reversal
new_capabilities_proposed.description: A steep speculative run-up above a prior trendline followed by breakdown and reversal, often used to call a new bullish phase after reset.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格先脱离原趋势线陡峭加速，随后完成回撤和反转，常用于识别一轮新趋势启动前的重置结构。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Parabolic Step-Like Formation
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 抛物线台阶式上涨结构
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trend advances through successive bases with accelerating slope; late-stage acceleration implies both upside extension and eventual exhaustion risk.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 趋势通过多个台阶式底部逐步抬升并加速，后期斜率明显变陡，既意味着上冲空间，也意味着后续衰竭风险上升。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片 7 直接标注 "PARABOLIC CURVE STEP-LIKE FORMATION"、Base 1-4、Sell Point，这是他的专门视觉模板。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 优先服从高时间框架结构，不被短线噪音干扰。
一旦形态框架建立，回调和等待都视作过程的一部分，不轻易改判。

personal_quirks.quote: Hold it tight, Stay Patient & trust the Process..
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 对已建立的中期多头仓位，核心动作是持有和耐心，而不是频繁交易。

personal_quirks.quote: Late shorts will get REKT soon..
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他喜欢把末端追空视为反向信号，倾向预判逼空和反身性上涨。
在他识别出的关键压缩/突破前区域，宁愿提前布局也不愿等完全确认后追高。

unique_traits: 他和一般 TA 号最大的区别，是把 BTC.D 下行几乎当作 Altseason 的总开关来交易与传播，而不是只盯单币图形。其次，他极度依赖形态学叙事，尤其偏爱楔形、旗形、三角形、扩张楔形，并且总是直接给出非常明确的中期目标位。最后，他的内容表达带强烈布道风格：高 conviction、长线持有、强调耐心，明显兼具交易员和流量型内容创作者属性。
